src: Installer for DataKitchen's Open Source Data Observability Products. Data breaks. Servers break. Your toolchain breaks. Ensure your team is the first to know and the first to solve with visibility across and down your data estate. Save time with simple, fast data quality test generation and execution. Trust your data, tools, and systems end to end.
ja: DataKitchenのオープンソースデータオブザーバビリティ製品向けインストーラー。データ、サーバー、ツールチェーンの障害をいち早く検知・解決。データ資産全体の可視性でシンプルかつ高速なデータ品質テストの生成と実行を実現
